text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We won, Trainer. I think... that was a great race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I had a lot of fun, and I'm certain the folks back
home would be proud.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...All that intense running has left me abnormally
hungry, though.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...All that intense running has left me abnormally
hungry, though.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean it? In that case, I think I'll have
sukiyaki, sushi, and a massive serving of carrots.
And then after that...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. Just thinking about it makes me hungrier...
and dizzy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh no. I think I'm going to collapse... Trainer, let's
go eat right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Of course. I give it my all in every race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Winning wouldn't be any fun if I wasn't serious.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Once my stomach's full, it's back to training. Let's
go!
